page_title: Those Guys Who Went To Marley
text:
is the second chapter of the Attack on Titan: High School manga, written and illustrated by Saki Nakagawa.

Overview

Reiner, Annie, Bertolt and Ymir are harassed at their new school for being transfer students. They are no longer regarded as humans, but demons. Ymir sends a picture of the other three being grabbed by a Titan, so Eren and co. go off to help.

Summary

The day before the Attack Junior High graduation ceremony, Connie announces that he was accepted into Attack High, and everyone is excited, especially Eren. He starts to say that all members of their club will be together, but Reiner, Annie and Bertolt tell him that they're going to a different school.

In the present, the three of them and Ymir are entering their new school; Marley Academy. It is a prestigious school where most of the students have been together since kindergarten, and the external students are treated as second-class citizens.

The four of them go to their homeroom class with their teacher, Theo Magath, who tells them that they are no longer human, but demons, and that they will be treated differently from the rest of the students for unknown reasons.

Ymir tells them that she hates the school and wants to leave and be with Krista, but the rest of them drag her along to their next classes. They're continually treated poorly throughout the day.

The next day, Ymir tries texting Krista again, but Reiner prevents her from doing so. Magath enters and tells them that there's a new transfer student joining them. The student enters and it is a giant Titan, who is also treated as poorly as they were the previous day.

Reiner remembers when he, Bertolt and Annie were off for Marley, Eren apologized for yelling at them and told them to work hard.

Ymir takes a picture of the Titan grabbing Reiner, Annie and Bertolt and sends it to Krista. She lets them know that their friends are coming to help as Eren, Mikasa and Armin enter the gates of Marley Academy.

Characters in order of appearance

Trivia

This chapter was soriginally untitled in its original publication on '. The title was added in the tankōbon release.
